SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.blowby

Class GasBlowbyResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.blowby.GasBlowbyResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GasBlowbyResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a GasBlowbyAnalyzer HP-to-LP gas blowby screening.

Holds the choked-flow status, the blowby mass and standard-volume rates through the fully open restriction, the downstream relief capacity and the screening verdict that compares the two.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • GasBlowbyResult

      public GasBlowbyResult(boolean choked, double criticalPressureRatio, double actualPressureRatio, double blowbyMassRateKgPerHr, double blowbyStdVolRateSm3PerHr, double restrictionAreaM2, double dischargeCoefficient, double specificHeatRatio, double molarMassKgPerMol, double reliefCapacityKgPerHr, boolean reliefDataProvided, double reliefMarginKgPerHr, boolean reliefAdequate, GasBlowbyAnalyzer.BlowbyVerdict verdict, List<String> warnings)
      Construct a gas blowby result.
      Parameters:
      choked - true if the flow through the restriction is critical (choked)
      criticalPressureRatio - critical downstream/upstream pressure ratio for choking
      actualPressureRatio - actual downstream/upstream pressure ratio
      blowbyMassRateKgPerHr - blowby mass rate through the fully open restriction in kg/h
      blowbyStdVolRateSm3PerHr - blowby standard volumetric rate in Sm3/h
      restrictionAreaM2 - effective restriction area in m2
      dischargeCoefficient - discharge coefficient used
      specificHeatRatio - specific-heat ratio (Cp/Cv) used
      molarMassKgPerMol - molar mass used in kg/mol
      reliefCapacityKgPerHr - downstream relief capacity in kg/h
      reliefDataProvided - true if a downstream relief capacity was supplied
      reliefMarginKgPerHr - relief capacity minus blowby rate in kg/h; NaN when no relief data supplied
      reliefAdequate - true if the downstream relief capacity exceeds the blowby rate
      verdict - the screening verdict
      warnings - list of warnings; never null

  • Method Details

    • isChoked

      public boolean isChoked()
      Indicates whether the flow through the restriction is choked.
      Returns:
      true if choked (critical) flow

      public double getMolarMassKgPerMol()
      Gets the molar mass used.
      Returns:
      molar mass in kg/mol

    • getReliefCapacityKgPerHr

      Gets the downstream relief capacity.

    • isReliefDataProvided

      public boolean isReliefDataProvided()
      Indicates whether a downstream relief capacity was supplied.
      Returns:
      true if relief data supplied

    • getReliefMarginKgPerHr

      public double getReliefMarginKgPerHr()
      Gets the margin between downstream relief capacity and blowby rate.
      Returns:
      margin in kg/h; negative when relief is insufficient, NaN when no relief data supplied

    • isReliefAdequate

      public boolean isReliefAdequate()
      Indicates whether the downstream relief capacity covers the blowby rate.
      Returns:
      true if relief is adequate

    • getVerdict

      public GasBlowbyAnalyzer.BlowbyVerdict getVerdict()
      Gets the screening verdict.
      Returns:
      the blowby verdict

      public List<String> getWarnings()
      Gets the warnings raised during the screening.
      Returns:
      list of warnings; never null

      Serializes this result to a human-readable JSON string.
